CustomField.formula:
ISPICKVAL( $User.GeographyLevel__c , "ALL") ||
AND((ISPICKVAL( $User.GeographyLevel__c , "Country")), ( TEXT( $User.GeographyValue__c ) = PKICountry__r.Name )) ||
AND((ISPICKVAL( $User.GeographyLevel__c , "Super Territory")), ( TEXT( $User.GeographyValue__c ) = TEXT(PKICountry__r.Super_Territory__c))) ||
AND((ISPICKVAL( $User.GeographyLevel__c , "Global territory")), ( TEXT( $User.GeographyValue__c ) = TEXT( PKICountry__r.Global_Territory__c ))) ||
AND((ISPICKVAL( $User.GeographyLevel__c , "Territory")), ( TEXT( $User.GeographyValue__c ) = TEXT( PKICountry__r.Territory__c ))) ||
AND((ISPICKVAL( $User.GeographyLevel__c , "Sub Territory")), ( TEXT( $User.GeographyValue__c ) = TEXT( PKICountry__r.Sub_Territory__c )))
CustomField.label: fxInUserGeography
